Welcome

Legacy Pest Control

Legacy Pest Control has been serving Tampa and the surrounding region with premium pest control services built on a foundation of integrity, craftsmanship, and an unwavering commitment to excellence. Our team brings decades of combined experience to every project, ensuring results that stand the test of time.

Why Choose Us

Why Tampa Trusts Legacy Pest Control

  • ✦ Quality Craftsmanship
  • ✦ Specialized Knowledge
  • ✦ Comprehensive Services
  • ✦ Proven Track Record
  • ✦ Family-Owned Commitment
Work With Us →
Affiliations & Certifications
What We Do

Our Services

Termite Inspection & Treatment

Tampa's warm, moist soil creates ideal conditions for subterranean termites that can compromise homes within months. Our...

Palmetto Bug Control

Tampa's palmetto bugs (American cockroaches) thrive in our storm drains, palm trees, and older plumbing systems. Unlike ...

Rodent Exclusion

Hurricane retrofit upgrades and aged soffits in Tampa's historic districts create perfect rodent entry points. Our exclu...

Mosquito Misting Systems

Tampa's daily summer rains create standing water where mosquitoes breed. Our misting systems: - Use timed micro-sprays ...

Bed Bug Treatment

Tampa's tourism industry and transient population make bed bugs a recurring challenge. Our heat treatment: - Raises roo...

Contact Us →
“
Caught termites early in our Seminole Heights bungalow thanks to their thorough inspection. They explained exactly how the colony was entering through our original 1930s pier blocks. Treatment preserved our historic home without damage.
— Maria S.
